title: salvia carnosa
intro: Salvia carnosa, also known as Red Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Salvia carnosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
